title: Burnham Becomes Labour Leader and Britain’s Incoming Prime Minister
summary_full: At a time of political upheaval and economic stagnation, Andy Burnham will on Monday become the seventh prime minister in a decade.
summary_public: At a time of political upheaval and economic stagnation, Andy Burnham will on Monday become the seventh prime minister in a decade.
